raw_consumer_statement:
When I contact the company the original intake customer service person say they understand my complaint. However, the charge continues to be reinstated. The disputes department has not resolved the matter and I continue to be charged penalties. 

I have asked that all penalties be frozen until the matter is resolved. I have carefully made sure that I dont continue to use the XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX issued by Barclays . I have asked to speak with a supervisor or someone who has the authority to resolve the matter to no avail. It appears to be a practice to sever the connection which is frustrating and then you have to start all over again. 

I need your assistance with resolving this matter. 

Thank you
